title: Report on the Subsidy to Kishorn Port Limited by Highlands and Islands Enterprise
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to HIE regarding its proposed Subsidy to KPL.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of HIE’s Assessment of Compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.    For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Kishorn Port Limited by Highlands and Islands Enterprise. "
